meta.title: Finding N-Day Vulnerabilities in an ICS Embedded Devices
meta.description:
N-Day is a software component vulnerability that is publicly known, but not recognized as being part of a software product that it is used in. We have a lot of these in ICS software and firmware.

Ang Cui and Joseph Pantoga of Red Balloon Security presents on how to automate the finding of N-Days and how to fix the N-Days. They uses VxWorks as an example.

The predict the number of N-Day vulnerabilities will explode, and propose an automated method for remediating this risk.
